# Du Nouy Ring Tensiometer

**Summary**: An instrument used to measure the surface tension of a liquid.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018]] used a Du Nouy ring tensiometer to determine the surface tension of various surfactant concentrations.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Measured surface tension values ranging from 70.5 mN/m (base) down to 32.4 mN/m with surfactants. ([[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018, p. 41]])
